title: Spicy Paneer Stir Fry
description: A Chinese-inspired stir fry dish made with paneer cheese and a spicy kick. This dish is quick, easy, and packed with flavor.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and ginger and stir-fry until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add chili flakes and stir-fry for another minute.
Add soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sugar, and stir to combine.
Add paneer and stir-fry until coated in the sauce.
Stir in scallions and cook for another minute.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with additional scallions if desired.
